meaning: n.幼儿园adj.幼儿园的,初级的,启蒙阶段的
examples: My musical career consisted of playing the triangle in kindergarten.
Some drawings by kindergarten kids are excellent.
One of the students is 5-year-old Taylor Alford, who started kindergarten last fall unable to speak.
Kindergarten, elementary school -- I don't know what you guys call it -- before eighth grade.
